And when she had weaned<S>1580</S> him, she took him up<S>5927</S> with her, with three<S>7969</S> bullocks<S>6499</S>, and one<S>259</S> ephah<S>374</S> of flour<S>7058</S>, and a bottle<S>5035</S> of wine<S>3196</S>, and brought<S>935</S> him unto the house<S>1004</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> in Shiloh<S>7887</S>: and the child<S>5288</S> was young<S>5288</S>.

2.text: And Hannah<S>2584</S> prayed<S>6419</S>, and said<S>559</S>, My heart<S>3820</S> rejoiceth<S>5970</S> in the LORD<S>3068</S>, mine horn<S>7161</S> is exalted<S>7311</S> in the LORD<S>3068</S>: my mouth<S>6310</S> is enlarged<S>7337</S> over mine enemies<S>341</S>; because I rejoice<S>8055</S> in thy salvation<S>3444</S>.

9.text: Now there was a man<S>376</S> of Benjamin<S>1144</S>, whose name<S>8034</S> was Kish<S>7027</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Abiel<S>22</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Zeror<S>6872</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Bechorath<S>1064</S>, the son<S>1121</S> of Aphiah<S>647</S>, a Benjamite<S>1145</S>, a mighty<S>1368</S> man<S>376</S> of power<S>2428</S>. <sup>a Benjamite: or, the son of a man of Jemini</sup> <sup>power: or, substance</sup>

And the servant<S>5288</S> answered<S>6030</S> Saul<S>7586</S> again<S>3254</S>, and said<S>559</S>, Behold, I have<S>4672</S> here at hand<S>3027</S> the fourth part<S>7253</S> of a shekel<S>8255</S> of silver<S>3701</S>: that will I give<S>5414</S> to the man<S>376</S> of God<S>430</S>, to tell<S>5046</S> us our way<S>1870</S>. <sup>I have: Heb. there is found in my hand</sup>

(Beforetime<S>6440</S> in Israel<S>3478</S>, when a man<S>376</S> went<S>3212</S> to enquire<S>1875</S> of God<S>430</S>, thus he spake<S>559</S>, Come<S>3212</S>, and let us go<S>3212</S> to the seer<S>7200</S>: for he that is now<S>3117</S> called a Prophet<S>5030</S> was beforetime<S>6440</S> called<S>7121</S> a Seer<S>7200</S>.)

And as they went up<S>5927</S> the hill<S>4608</S> to the city<S>5892</S>, they found<S>4672</S> young maidens<S>5291</S> going out<S>3318</S> to draw<S>7579</S> water<S>4325</S>, and said<S>559</S> unto them, Is<S>3426</S> the seer<S>7200</S> here? <sup>the hill: Heb. in the ascent of the city</sup>

And they went up<S>5927</S> into<S>8432</S> the city<S>5892</S>: and when they were come<S>935</S> into the city<S>5892</S>, behold, Samuel<S>8050</S> came out<S>3318</S> against<S>7125</S> them, for to go up<S>5927</S> to the high place<S>1116</S>.

To morrow<S>4279</S> about this time<S>6256</S> I will send<S>7971</S> thee a man<S>376</S> out of the land<S>776</S> of Benjamin<S>1144</S>, and thou shalt anoint<S>4886</S> him to be captain<S>5057</S> over my people<S>5971</S> Israel<S>3478</S>, that he may save<S>3467</S> my people<S>5971</S> out of the hand<S>3027</S> of the Philistines<S>6430</S>: for I have looked<S>7200</S> upon my people<S>5971</S>, because their cry<S>6818</S> is come<S>935</S> unto me.

10.text: Then Samuel<S>8050</S> took<S>3947</S> a vial<S>6378</S> of oil<S>8081</S>, and poured<S>3332</S> it upon his head<S>7218</S>, and kissed<S>5401</S> him, and said<S>559</S>, Is it not because the LORD<S>3068</S> hath anointed<S>4886</S> thee to be captain<S>5057</S> over his inheritance<S>5159</S>?

And it shall come to pass, that when these signs, etc</sup> <sup>that: Heb. do for thee as thine hand shall find</sup>

And thou shalt go down<S>3381</S> before<S>6440</S> me to Gilgal<S>1537</S>; and, behold, I will come down<S>3381</S> unto thee, to offer<S>5927</S> burnt offerings<S>5930</S>, and to sacrifice<S>2076</S> sacrifices<S>2077</S> of peace offerings<S>8002</S>: seven<S>7651</S> days<S>3117</S> shalt thou tarry<S>3176</S>, till I come<S>935</S> to thee, and shew<S>3045</S> thee what thou shalt do<S>6213</S>.

Then Samuel<S>8050</S> told<S>1696</S> the people<S>5971</S> the manner<S>4941</S> of the kingdom<S>4410</S>, and wrote<S>3789</S> it in a book<S>5612</S>, and laid it up<S>3240</S> before<S>6440</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>.
